creator: moto@kawasaki3.org
text:
- Can we rename the py-pyroute2.core directory to something like py-pyroute2-core ?
  The reason follows.

- 100.clean-disks script in [periodic] searches '*.core' files and remove them if enabled in /etc/periodic.conf.

- [ports] net/py-pyroute2.core is the core component of the pyroute2 package in ports, and have directory of /usr/ports/net/py-pyroute2.core/.

- 100.clean-disks misunderstands py-pyroute2.core directory as core file, and try to delete in vain. The error message is;

```
Cleaning disks:
rm: py-pyroute2.core: Directory not empty
```

thanks.
